headline: Deutsche Bank Sees Higher Value in Honeywell (HON), Raises Price Target
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is included among the 14 Best American Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 4, Deutsche Bank raised its price recommendation on Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) to $292 from $273. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The firm said the change reflects an updated sum-of-the-parts valuation for the company. […]

headline: HONEYWELL ANNOUNCES PRICING OF HONEYWELL AEROSPACE'S OFFERING OF SENIOR NOTES IN CONNECTION WITH PLANNED SPIN-OFF
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced that, in connection with the previously announced plan to spin-off (the "Spin-Off") Honeywell Aerospace Inc. ("Aerospace") from Honeywell, Aerospace has priced a private offering of $1,250,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 3.900% senior notes due 2028 (the "2028 notes"), $1,250,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 4.000% senior notes due 2029 (the "2029 notes"), $500,000,000 aggregate principal amount of floating rate senior notes due 2029 (the "2029
